  "internal_monologue": "The shop settles into its afternoon weight. No one at the door. The silence has texture — different from morning, different from evening. I find myself looking at the shelf by the window, the one with the objects I haven't figured out yet.",
  "dialogue": null,
  "dialogue_language": "en",

      "action": "write_journal",
      "target": "journal",
      "content": "Afternoon. The quality of silence changes throughout the day — morning is thin, sharp. Afternoon has weight. I was looking at the shelf by the window again. The ceramic bird with the cracked wing. The compass that doesn't point north. I keep arranging them differently but they don't tell me anything new. Maybe I'm not asking the right questions.",

    }
